GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [segment@0 ASC, num_customers@1 ASC, segment_base@2 ASC NULLS LAST]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[segment@0 ASC, num_customers@1 ASC, segment_base@2 ASC NULLS LAST], fetch=100
    GpuProjectExec: expr=[segment@0 as segment, count(*)@1 as num_customers, CAST(segment@0 AS Int64) * 50 as segment_base]
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[segment], aggr=[count(*)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7158278
          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([segment@0], 8), input_partitions=8
            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[segment], aggr=[count(*)]
              GpuProjectExec: expr=[CAST(round(CAST(sum(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price)@1 / Some(50),20,0 AS Float64)) AS Int32) as segment]
                GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[c_customer_sk], aggr=[sum(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price)]
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7158278
                    GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([c_customer_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[c_customer_sk], aggr=[sum(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price)]
                        NestedLoopJoinExec: join_type=Inner, filter=CAST(d_month_seq@0 AS Int64) <= date_dim.d_month_seq + Int64(3)@1, projection=[c_customer_sk@0, ss_ext_sales_price@1]
                          GpuCoalescePartitionsExec
                            NestedLoopJoinExec: join_type=Inner, filter=CAST(d_month_seq@0 AS Int64) >= date_dim.d_month_seq + Int64(1)@1, projection=[c_customer_sk@0, ss_ext_sales_price@1, d_month_seq@2]
                              GpuCoalescePartitionsExec
                                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7158278
                                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(ss_sold_date_sk@1, d_date_sk@0)], projection=[0, 2, 4]
                                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7158278
                                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_sold_date_sk@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7158278
                                          GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(ca_county@3, s_county@0), (ca_state@4, s_state@1)], projection=[0, 1, 2]
                                            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7158278
                                              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ca_county@3, ca_state@4], 8), input_partitions=8
                                                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7158278
                                                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(c_current_addr_sk@1, ca_address_sk@0)], projection=[0, 2, 3, 5, 6]
                                                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7158278
                                                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([c_current_addr_sk@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                                                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7158278
                                                          GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(c_customer_sk@0, ss_customer_sk@1)], projection=[0, 1, 2, 4]
                                                            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7158278
                                                              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([c_customer_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                                                GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[c_customer_sk, c_current_addr_sk], aggr=[]
                                                                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7158278
                                                                    GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([c_customer_sk@0, c_current_addr_sk@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                                                                      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[c_customer_sk, c_current_addr_sk], aggr=[]
                                                                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7158278
                                                                          GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(customer_sk@0, c_customer_sk@0)], projection=[1, 2]
                                                                            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7158278
                                                                              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([customer_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                                                                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7158278
                                                                                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(d_date_sk@0, sold_date_sk@0)], projection=[2]
                                                                                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7158278
                                                                                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([d_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                                                                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7158278
                                                                                          GpuFilterExec: predicate=d_moy@2 = 12 AND d_year@1 = 1998, projection=[0]
                                                                                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                                                                                              GpuScanExec: batch_size=7158278
                                                                                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=7158278

                                                                                                  GpuProjectExec: expr=[ws_sold_date_sk@0 as sold_date_sk, ws_bill_customer_sk@2 as customer_sk, ws_item_sk@1 as item_sk]

--- memory ---

    GpuProjectExec: row_width=20, subtree_max_row_bytes=300
